place_folding_board.query: a worker places a white rectangular folding board in the center of a light-purple shirt and aligns the board with both hands

fold_shirt_around_board.query: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-purple shirt inward around a white folding board

turn_and_neaten_folded_shirt.query: a worker lifts the folded light-purple shirt, turns it over to the front, and straightens its shape with both hands

stack_folded_shirt.query: a worker places the finished folded light-purple shirt on top of the completed stack at the upper side of the table
